hero.subtitle: No long-term contracts. No surprise invoices. No hidden fees. Pay for what you need — stop when you don't.

cards.tagline: No contracts. No minimums. Just fast, honest help.
Dignity-first tech support. Plain English always.
10% off prepaid hours. 10-hour minimum. Hours never expire.
Scoped projects. Written quotes. No surprises.

items.a: No. Break/Fix and Time-Block hours have no ongoing commitment. Senior Concierge is month-to-month — cancel any time with 30 days notice. Professional Services projects have a one-time project agreement with no ongoing obligation.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: ACH bank transfer, check, and all major credit cards. Monthly service invoices are sent by email on the 1st of each month.

items.q: Do you serve clients outside Kansas?
items.a: Yes — all remote services are available nationwide. On-site support is currently Kansas and surrounding region.

You purchase a block of IT hours in advance at a 10% discount off our standard $125/hr rate — that's $112.50/hr. Minimum purchase is 10 hours. Hours never expire and you get priority scheduling over standard break/fix clients.
Yes — contact us to discuss a custom package for your situation.

cta.heading: Not Sure Which Service Fits?
cta.body: Tell us about your situation — we'll recommend the right fit with no pressure and no sales pitch.
